titleStmt.title: SII 10.471: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 471. (A.R. No. 183 of 1905.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE. Ś. 1213. (Khara)

summary.p: States that general Mummaḍi-Nāyaka, son of Nāgi-Nāyaka of Rēcheṟla-kula, granted 50 cows, 3 bulls and one lamp-stand to the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti sakalaguṇagaṇālaṁkāra paranārīdūra Āmanakaṁṭipuravarādhīśvara
vīralakṣmīnijēśvara labhīma raṇaraṁgarāma vitaraṇaka¨rṇna vikramasaupa¨rṇna patihi
tāṁjanēya śaucagāṁgēya svāmidrōharagaṁḍa cētanabhujādaṁḍa satyaratnākara duṣṭa
janabhīkara subhaṭasaṁstutya manumakulāditya vivēkavidyādhara gaṁbhīrasāgara Ana
varataparahitācaraṇa raṁgapā¨rttha pratyakṣadhammanaṁdana sujanaharicaṁdana nāmādisama
stapraśastisahitu laina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara sakalasēnādhipa rēceṟlakulōttamu laina koṁtā
la nāgināyunikoḍuku śrīmatu muṁmaḍināyuṁḍu tamataṁḍri nāgināyunikiṁ bu
ṇyalōkaprāpti gānu svasti śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1213 Agu nēṁṭi kharasaṁvatsara puṣya śuddha 5 nāṁṭi
makarasaṁkramapuṇyakālamuna svasti śrītripurāṁtaka śrīmahādēvaraku Akhaṁḍadīpānaku Icci namō
dālu 50 Āṁbōtulu 3 lōhadīpakaṁbamu 1 dīniEttu viśyala 16 pala 16 ... Īpa nulaṁ jēkoni ne
ṭyamu Anniśeṭṭi nityamāneṁḍu nēyi tanaputrānupautramu naḍapaṁgalavāṁḍu Īdi vyakā
ṁpunaku kōṭabhūmilōni māṁdalanuIccina veliśēnu kha 1 vīridivaraku Iccina vīrarājēṁdra
goḍagulu 2 veṁḍimaralu 2 maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 10.471 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
